name: Drake Baldwin
headline: Baldwin went 2-for-4 with a walk, a triple, a home run and four RBI in Monday's Grapefruit League game against the Rays.

name: Vladimir Guerrero Jr.
headline: Guerrero went 2-for-4 with an RBI in Thursday's Grapefruit League game against the Yankees.

name: Gleyber Torres
headline: Torres was scratched from the lineup for Saturday's Grapefruit League game against the Yankees due to lower-back tightness.

name: Austin Riley
headline: Riley could be surprisingly active as a base stealer this season under the tutelage of new Atlanta baserunning coach Antoan Richardson, Mark Bowman of MLB.

name: Zachary Neto
headline: Neto was removed from Friday's Cactus League game against the White Sox after being hit by a pitch, but he is OK, Rhett Bollinger of MLB.

name: James Wood
headline: Wood went 0-for-2 with a walk and a run scored in Saturday's Grapefruit League game against the Phillies.

name: Jo Adell
headline: Adell went 0-for-1 as the designated hitter in Monday's Grapefruit League game against the Rays.

name: George Springer
headline: Springer went 2-for-4 with a two-run homer in Thursday's Grapefruit League game against the Yankees.

name: Kazuma Okamoto
headline: Okamoto went 2-for-5 with a double in Saturday's Grapefruit League game against the Yankees.

name: Gabriel Moreno
headline: Moreno went 1-for-4 with a double in Saturday's Cactus League game against the Brewers.

name: Ernie Clement
headline: Clement went 2-for-3 with two runs scored and an RBI in Saturday's Grapefruit League game against the Phillies.

name: Heliot Ramos
headline: Ramos went 1-for-4 with a double in Saturday's Cactus League game against the Brewers.

name: Jac Caglianone
headline: Caglianone went 2-for-4 with a walk and a run scored in Saturday's Cactus League game against the A's.

name: Jakob Marsee
headline: Marsee went 1-for-4 in Tuesday's Grapefruit League game against the Rays.

name: Ethan Holliday
headline: Holliday went 1-for-3 with a walk in Sunday's Cactus League game against the Angels.

name: Eli Willits
headline: Willits went 0-for-2 with a walk and a run in Tuesday's Grapefruit League game against the Rays.

name: Charlie Condon
headline: Condon went 1-for-4 with a run scored in Monday's Grapefruit League game against the Nationals.

name: Max Clark
headline: Clark went 0-for-3 in Saturday's Cactus League game against the Rockies.

name: Tanner Bibee
headline: Bibee pitched two innings, allowing one hit and one earned run with one walk and two strikeouts in Saturday's Grapefruit League game against the Yankees.

name: MacKenzie Gore
headline: Gore tossed three innings, allowing two hits with four strikeouts in Wednesday's Grapefruit League game against the Marlins.

name: Matthew Liberatore
headline: Liberatore pitched two innings and allowed two runs on two hits in Tuesday's Grapefruit League game against the Rays.

name: Shane McClanahan
headline: McClanahan allowed one run on three hits with three walks and two strikeouts over three innings during Saturday's Grapefruit League game against the Yankees.

name: Yoshinobu Yamamoto
headline: Yamamoto pitched four innings, allowing three runs on five hits with four strikeouts in Thursday's Cactus League game against the Padres.

name: Jhoan Duran
headline: Duran pitched one inning, allowing zero hits and striking out two in Thursday's Cactus League game against the Indians.

name: Griffin Jax
headline: Jax pitched one inning, allowing one run in Monday's Cactus League game against the Cubs.

name: Mason Miller
headline: Miller pitched one inning and struck out two batters in Sunday's Cactus League game against the Angels.

name: Tyler Rogers
headline: Rogers pitched one inning, allowing one hit and one earned run in Saturday's Cactus League game against the Brewers.

name: JoJo Romero
headline: Romero pitched 1.1 innings, allowing one hit in Saturday's Grapefruit League game against the Phillies.

name: Mick Abel
headline: Abel allowed one run in two innings pitched during Saturday's Grapefruit League game against the Phillies.

name: Jose Soriano
headline: Soriano pitched one inning, allowing zero hits and striking out two in Thursday's Cactus League game against the Indians.
